supersedes: MR002_Stage3_ExecutionPackage_v1.0 (review verdict 2026-07-17: WITHHELD, 30 findings). This revision is the first repair cycle.
status: DRAFT — implementation component, stub fixtures, provenance validator, population runner, and source manifest are prepared and tested. Real-stack pre-execution harness PASS artifact, final commit binding, full OCI config digest, and pinned expected-identities are still required before the execution countersignature. No Stage-3 instance has been run.
classification: numerical-implementation package. Does not alter the registered MR-002 research design, feasible set, objectives, signal, risk limits, gates, or data windows.

review.verdict: WITHHELD — 30 findings; address blockers 1-6 before secondary hardening

1_quadprog_allowlist_applied_to_piqp.where: stage3_cascade.NUMERICAL_ALLOWLIST is SOLVER-SCOPED, keyed (solver_id, class, message); PIQP has no registered numerical status so a PIQP raise -> INTEGRITY_DEFECT

2_class_name_not_exact_class.where: match_registered_numerical uses type(exc) (class OBJECT identity), keyed on builtins.ValueError; subclasses and same-named user classes do not match

3_provenance_integrity_gates_not_impleme.where: scripts/mr002_stage3_preflight.py — pure evaluate(env, expected, source_defects), fail-closed; run_preflight is the runner's HARD GATE

4_population_stop_not_enforced.where: scripts/mr002_stage3_population_runner.py — halts immediately on any stop-class/outside-table outcome; marks checkpoint FAILED/non-resumable; no aggregate PASS after a stop

5_no_final_implementation_commit.status: OPEN — this repair cycle ends with the final commit; the execution countersignature binds that commit+tree externally

6_dependencies_not_byte_bound.where: scripts/mr002_stage3_source_manifest.py + MR002_Stage3_SourceManifest_v1.0.json byte-binds all 19 load-bearing files (git blob + sha256 + bytes); preflight verifies the working tree against it

7_malformed_inputs_crash.where: validate_model_inputs: isinstance/arity guard, try-guarded conversion, ndim-before-index, upper>=0

8_candidate_conversion_escapes.where: normalize guards arity unpack + np.asarray of candidate; NON_NUMERIC_CANDIDATE / SOLVER_RETURN_NOT_A_PAIR

9_certifier_contract_not_validated.where: _validate_certifier_result (3-tuple, ok is real bool, bad is list[str], cert present, ok<->empty-bad) + production SignedGapCertificate isinstance check

10_baseexception_too_broad.where: normalize catches Exception, not BaseException; KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit/GeneratorExit propagate

11_assertions_for_integrity.where: resolve replaces assert with an explicit INVALID_RUN branch; _default_primary/_fallback raise Stage3IntegrityError on solver-identity drift

12_model_validation_incomplete.where: validate_model_inputs now enforces t>0, upper>=0, shapes/ndim, finiteness; the constructor invariants are enumerated

13_accepted_arrays_mutable.where: _frozen_copy returns a read-only copy; accepted_z is not writeable and is decoupled from the caller's array

14_branch8_wrong_rule.where: Branch-8 rewritten: UNRESOLVED only via fallback CERTIFICATE nonqualification; PIQP raising the QUADPROG message -> INTEGRITY

15_exactly_once_not_proven.where: CountingSolver asserts fallback calls==1 on every eligible branch and ==0 on every non-eligible branch

16_missing_malformed_contract_tests.where: malformed-contract battery: non-iterable rec, scalar t, unconvertible, None/too-many returns, non-numeric candidate, malformed/ non-bool certifier, negative upper, input+output mutation

17_no_production_binding_test.where: test_production_binding_uses_frozen_solvers (importorskip piqp/mpmath; runs in the pinned image)

18_realism_harness_deferred_too_late.where: harness reframed as a PRE-EXECUTION GATE; its PASS artifact MUST be produced in-image and included before the countersignature

19_producibility_claim_overstated.where: harness now states it exercises PRIMARY_QUALIFIED, FALLBACK_QUALIFIED, and a REAL CERTIFICATE_NONQUALIFICATION (real certifier rejects a suboptimal candidate); it explicitly does NOT synthesize the real QUADPROG ValueError, real UNRESOLVED, or real certifier-exception INTEGRITY

20_output_write_failure_silent.where: harness returns exit 3 if it cannot persist its artifact

21_harness_runtime_binding.where: harness runtime_block records commit/tree, image+OCI digest, versions, CPU flags, env, fingerprints, per-case rec+outcome hashes

22_oci_config_digest_truncated.status: OPEN — full 64-hex OCI config digest must be captured in-image; preflight._is_full_digest FAILS a truncated/placeholder digest

23_mutable_tag_in_command.where: container_execution_spec + harness command use mr002-research@sha256:<full-digest>, and the pulled image ID is verified before running

24_equivalence_proof_overstated.where: runtime_configuration.empirical_equivalence_requirement replaces the 'bit-for-bit proof' with an empirical protocol (exact image, same-image repeatability, shuffle invariance, manifest comparison, stop-on-divergence)

25_container_hardening_unspecified.where: container_execution_spec (ro mount, --network none, fresh out dir, fixed UID, read-only rootfs, no creds, resource limits, atomic writes)

26_component_not_complete_runner.where: the clean successor runner (preflight gate -> corpus regen -> population resolve via §7 cascade -> records -> reconcile -> STOP -> checkpoint -> OOS lockout)

27_test_evidence_asserted_not_preserved.where: MR002_Stage3_TestReport_v1.0.json (command, exit, counts, env, source commit, stdout hash, file hashes). ⚠ MUST be regenerated at the final committed implementation

28_quarantine_checks_too_weak.where: preflight cascade_import_hygiene positively checks the loaded module set contains no quarantined module; the clean-run launcher spec requires fresh-directory attestation + positive input-path allowlisting (see quarantine_non_reuse)

29_source_manifest_not_bound.where: MR002_Stage3_SourceManifest_v1.0.json is the complete source manifest; generator + verifier included

30_status_internally_premature.where: this record's `status` states DRAFT accurately and lists the remaining pre-countersignature items

source_manifest.note: byte-binds all 19 load-bearing files (cascade numerical path 9, corpus-regeneration path 3, execution-package components 7)

test_report.caveat: generated against a DIRTY working tree; regenerate at the final commit

runtime_configuration.cpu_requirement: AVX2-only CPU (c6a/m6a/r6a). NEVER AVX-512. Enforced by preflight cpu_avx2_present + cpu_avx512_absent.

empirical_equivalence_requirement.note: The prior 'AVX2/FMA3 is bit-for-bit identical across Intel/AMD — equivalence proof' claim is WITHDRAWN as overstated (finding 24). Numerical results can depend on library build, dispatch, compiler flags, solver code paths, denormal handling, and reduction order even at the same nominal ISA.
protocol: execute on the exact pinned image + target platform
regenerate the corpus and compare the full manifest + qualification set against the registered corpus hash 1d231930...

container_execution_spec.image_reference: mr002-research@sha256:<FULL-DIGEST>  (immutable digest, NOT a tag; verify the pulled image ID before running — finding 23)
container_execution_spec.oci_config_digest: OPEN — full 64-hex digest to be captured in-image; the recorded sha256:770553aeae6c is a truncated prefix and is NOT bindable (finding 22)

quarantine_non_reuse.negative_checks: no quarantined token (2307/3839/corpus hash/AMENDED-PASS) in the finalized source, fixtures, harness, preflight, or runner (grep-clean)
quarantine_non_reuse.positive_checks: preflight cascade_import_hygiene asserts the loaded module set contains none of {full_population, dataset, runner, exact_repair, exact_simplex}; exact_repair/exact_simplex are deliberately NOT on the cascade path
clean_run_launcher_requirements: fresh-directory attestation for the output path
positive allowlisting of input paths (not only negative grep)
no reused checkpoint (a FAILED terminal marker is non-resumable)

remaining_before_execution_countersignat: the final implementation commit + tree containing every file above (finding 5)
the full 64-hex OCI config digest captured in-image (finding 22)
the pinned ExpectedPins: package versions, callable fingerprints, material config (from a clean in-image gather_env)
a preserved PASS artifact from the in-image realism harness at that image (finding 18)
the test report regenerated at the final committed implementation (finding 27)
scope_boundary: This package authorizes NOTHING to execute. Until the separate execution countersignature: no Stage-3 instance runs (run_clean_successor refuses without MR002_EXECUTION_COUNTERSIGN); MR002_Implementation_Erratum_v1.0 remains SUSPENDED; the quarantined AMENDED PASS remains non-reusable; preflight CLOSED; performance NOT COMPUTED; validation and sealed OOS SEALED AND UNREAD.
